title: Minneapolis Fed president likens stablecoins to casino chips
message_html: Minneapolis Fed president likens stablecoins to casino chips ...
snippet: Neel Kashkari, President of the Minneapolis Federal Reserve, likened stablecoins to casino chips during a Bank of Korea event. The comparison was actually a practical one. He noted that despite claims to the contrary, the vast majority of stablecoin usage is for cryptocurrency transactions. Casinos

title: Stellar CEO Says Tokenization Will Proceed Even if Clarity Act Stalls
message_html: Stellar CEO Says Tokenization Will Proceed Even if Clarity Act Stalls ...
snippet: Last week, the Depository Trust & Clearing Corporation (DTCC) launched a collaboration with the Stellar blockchain. title: Crossmint enables Visa card payments for AI agents and autonomous commerce
message_html: Crossmint enables Visa card payments for AI agents and autonomous commerce ...
snippet: The new API lets AI agents make purchases with eligible Visa cards using tokenized credentials and spending controls, expanding payment options for autonomous software.

title: Movement expands stablecoin payments push with access to US, Canada, EU rails
message_html: Movement expands stablecoin payments push with access to US, Canada, EU rails ...
snippet: The Move-based blockchain network said it gained access to licensed payment infrastructure as it shifts toward stablecoin settlement and remittances.
